specific_question: Under the 2025 framework, what is the average administrative time (in staff hours) Elexion Automotive requires to compile and verify one complete supply-chain investment report per compliance cycle?
answer: Under the 2025 framework, Elexion Automotive requires 40 staff hours to compile and verify one complete supply-chain investment report per compliance cycle.
justification: Measuring the current hours per report quantifies the manual workload and identifies where automation or template standardization will yield the largest time savings in the new documentation protocol.
dr_question: How should Elexion Automotive update its compliance documentation framework by 2026 to verify and record supply-chain investment credits under Canada’s revised ZEV mandate?
